description:
No .github/ exists. Neither the default `mix test` lane nor the `mix test.integration` alias (which gates the real path-dep + archive install paths) runs automatically.

Add .github/workflows/ci.yml:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors
- mix test
- mix test.integration (downstream_adoption + archive_install)
- (optional) mix format --check-formatted

Pin Elixir 1.19 / OTP 28 to match the declared `elixir: "~> 1.19"` constraint.

Acceptance: CI runs green on push/PR.
title: Add GitHub Actions CI
